brand.name: Mundo Infantil
brand.vibe: Colorful, modern, playful, family-friendly, trust-worthy e-commerce

typography.setup_instruction: Import Fredoka and Nunito from Google Fonts.
typography.h1: font-fredoka text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#1F2937]
typography.h2: font-fredoka text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold text-[#1F2937]

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for cards, buttons, and sections.
spacing_and_layout.shadows: shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.06)] for floating cards, shadow-sm for default.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system_marketing: Bento Grid (Mode A) for promos. Asymmetrical grids for visual interest.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system_catalog: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 for toys.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system_admin: Mode B (Control Room) with tighter gaps (gap-6) but soft rounded widgets.

components.header: Sticky nav (sticky top-0 z-50), bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E5E7EB]. Centered colorful text logo. Cart, user, and loyalty points on the right.
components.hero_section: Overlaid hero. Use the hero_banner image with a bg-black/20 overlay. Center aligned text, massive H1 in White, contrasting CTA in Yellow (#FFD93D) or #FF6B6B.
components.product_card: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-2. Image container max-h-48 overflow-hidden rounded-t-2xl. Body p-4. H3 for title, bold text-[#4CAFEE] for price. Primary button 'Comprar'.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary: bg-[#4CAFEE] text-white hover:bg-[#3B9AD0]. Secondary: bg-[#FFD93D] text-gray-900. Accent: bg-[#FF6B6B] text-white. Include icon (cart, star) on left side of text. Padding: px-6 py-3.
components.inputs: rounded-xl border border-gray-200 bg-white p-3 font-nunito focus:ring-4 focus:ring-[#4CAFEE]/20 focus:border-[#4CAFEE].
components.loyalty_badge: Round pills or star-shaped SVG elements. Bronze, Silver, Gold colors.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Playful scale-ups. hover:scale-105 on buttons. hover:-translate-y-2 on cards.
interactions_and_motion.page_transitions: Framer motion staggered fade-ins for product grids.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over colorful backgrounds meets APCA. Use dark text on yellow, white text on blue/red/green.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST have role-based data-testid (e.g., 'buy-toy-button', 'cart-icon-link', 'category-filter').

hero_banner.description: Toy store interior to use as hero section background

promo_kids.description: Toddler playing, use for 'Shop by Age' or Promo sections

product_toy_1.description: White teddy bear to use as a product example

loyalty_icon.description: Gold star medal for loyalty program visual

home: Header: Logo 'Mundo Infantil', Search bar, Cart, Login, Points
Hero: Image background, text 'Encuentra los mejores juguetes para todas las edades', primary CTA 'Explorar Catálogo'
Features: Icon row (Fast shipping, Safe toys, Earn Points)
Products: Grid of toy cards (Image, Title, Price, Buy button)
Promotions: Bento grid showing discounts using bright #FF6B6B and #FFD93D blocks
Loyalty Section: 'Únete y gana puntos' with tiers (Bronze/Silver/Gold)
dashboard_user: Loyalty Progress Bar (Points to next tier)

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a hybrid e-commerce app. The front-end store must feel like a modern, fun app for kids/parents.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts (Home, Promos) to allow overlapping and playful asymmetry.
For interactive logic (Cart, Checkout, Admin Data Tables), use heavily customized Shadcn components. Strip the default Vercel look by applying rounded-2xl, the custom colors, and soft shadows.
Avoid the standard 'dark mode' entirely; lock the app to light mode (Vibrant Play archetype).
For loyalty tiers, use the accent colors: #FF6B6B (Bronze/Base), #4CAFEE (Silver/Mid), #FFD93D (Gold/Top).
Ensure the application strictly handles .js/.jsx extensions for any frontend files.
